title: lithocarpus angustifolius
intro: Lithocarpus angustifolius, also known as the Angustifolia Lithocarpus or Narrow-leaved Lithocarpus, is a type of tree species belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Lithocarpus angustifolius is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
